creator: avatar@mmlab.cse.yzu.edu.tw
text:
Upgrade port chinese/pine4 from 4.40 to 4.43.

	This upgrade also takes out of the Message-ID header the information
	about the operating system, the version of Pine, and the word "PINE"
	(see PR26051).

How-To-Repeat: 
	Please check and commit the patch presented in "Fix" section, thanks.
